area.value: 1 creature/3 levels no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: You must have a bardic performance in effect to cast this spell. With a flourish, you immediately end your performance, dealing 2d8 points of sonic damage to each target. In addition, each target takes 3d6 points of bleed damage for 1d6 rounds. A save negates the bleed damage but not the sonic damage. Section 15: Copyright Notice Advanced Player’s Guide.
